sys_remote_update_set.name: FSM Change Bridge — correlation fields
sys_remote_update_set.description: Adds paired reference fields linking change_task and wm_order for the FSM Work Order <-> Change Task bridge. change_task.u_linked_work_order points at the mirrored work order; wm_order.u_linked_change_task points back at the change task. Both nullable. Pairs with the scoped app x_jw_fsmchgbr.

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_change_task_u_linked_work_order
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>bfb696cb212684c63eb105fcbab76902</sys_id> <name>change_task</name> <element>u_linked_work_order</element> <column_label>Linked Work Order</column_label> <internal_type>reference</internal_type> <reference>wm_order</reference> <reference_qual/> <default_value/> <active>true</active> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <read_only>false</read_only> <comments>Reference to the FSM work order mirrored from this change task by the x_jw_fsmchgbr bridge. Empty for change tasks that have no field-work counterpart. Set by FsmChangeBridge, not by hand. </comments> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_change_task_u_linked_work_order</sys_update_name> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>

sys_update_xml.name: sys_dictionary_wm_order_u_linked_change_task
sys_update_xml.payload: <?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?> <record_update table="sys_dictionary"> <sys_dictionary action="INSERT_OR_UPDATE"> <sys_id>71f6bcd699c7502dd4e7f5aadcdc5820</sys_id> <name>wm_order</name> <element>u_linked_change_task</element> <column_label>Linked Change Task</column_label> <internal_type>reference</internal_type> <reference>change_task</reference> <reference_qual/> <default_value/> <active>true</active> <mandatory>false</mandatory> <read_only>false</read_only> <comments>Reference to the change task mirrored from this work order by the x_jw_fsmchgbr bridge. Empty for work orders with no change counterpart (e.g. purely reactive WOs). Set by FsmChangeBridge, not by hand. </comments> <sys_update_name>sys_dictionary_wm_order_u_linked_change_task</sys_update_name> </sys_dictionary> </record_update>
